Deprecated.
use EditPage instead.

  • Method Details

    • createMasterSection

      protected EventBPartWithButtons createMasterSection(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, int style, IEventBEditor<?> editor)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from class: EventBFormPage
      This method create a master section which should be an Event-B Part with Buttons. Sub-class should implement this method and return their own specific part.

      Specified by:
      createMasterSection in class EventBFormPage
      Parameters:
      managedForm - The managed form used to create the part.
      parent - The composite parent of the part
      style - The style to create the part
      editor - The Event-B Editor.
      Returns:
      A new Event-B Part with Buttons
